_label_note: UK Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public HR assistance-line bait, UK entity/FRN/UTR numeric fragments, obfuscated employee/session IDs, system-bucket account bait, genetic-data metaphor wording, and public/manual employment-matter material-event bait. UK IDTA labels were kept as deterministic cross-border-transfer findings where the fixture describes actual payroll/HR data exports.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: delaying disclosure under Article 17(4) UK MAR
pending acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd
an all-share acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd
heads of terms for an all-share acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd at an implied consideration of £68–72m
Closed period for PDMR dealing commenced on 21 July 2026
selective briefings are limited to wall-crossed banks on the syndicate
do not share deal materials to non-wall-crossed recipients prior to her formal wall-crossing
proposed disposal of the Consumer Credit book
pre-sounding calls with potential placees must be conducted under NDA
Subject: Proposed Tier 2 capital raise and pending acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd; handling of inside information and dealing restrictions.

Per Article 7 UK MAR, the board has received precise non-public information: heads of terms for an all-share acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd at an implied consideration of £68–72m, expected to be price-sensitive for Northhaven Capital plc.

Any investor communication must use a Regulatory Information Service; if leakage occurs, an immediate holding announcement must be released via a RIS in line with DTR 2.2 guidance from the competent authority.
